creator: johan@stromnet.se
text:
Makes sense.

Would it be possible to make them overrideable for adventurous people like me? 

JAVE_VERSION?=1.7 would be possible, but that may accidentally make people use it..
JAVA_VERSION=${<port>_JAVA_VERSION:-1.7} could be an alternative.. 
Or some other port-specific solution I'm not aware of :)
